description: Create a reproducible read-only audit that explicitly separates two maturity levels: procurement already performs live API/browser-backed source scans, while scheduled commercial discovery currently replays static seed_candidates and performs zero live Exa search. Measure source counts, health, scan outcomes, findings, promotions, rejection reasons, Exa operator-preview spend, scheduled commercial run yield, and stage failures. Define canonical failure categories for API, HTTP, selectors, credentials, browser runtime, extraction, scoring, dedupe, and promotion. Acceptance: rerunnable Ash-interface metrics prove the procurement baseline and demonstrate the scheduled commercial no-live-search gap without raw Repo access.
title: Baseline acquisition yield and failure taxonomy
